name: midaz-mcp-server
description: A MCP server for the Midaz platform. Enables AI assistants to interact with Midaz's core banking APIs for automated ledger operations, account management, and transaction processing. Features comprehensive API coverage, real-time data access, and robust error handling for building AI-powered financial applications and intelligent fintech workflows.
